ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "rmse" REAL /* Root Mean Square Error of the model */,
  "mae" REAL /* Mean Absolute Error of the model */,
  "time_this_iter_s" REAL /* Time taken for this iteration in seconds */,
  "done" INTEGER /* Indicates if the experiment is completed */,
  "training_iteration" INTEGER /* The training iteration number */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the experiment */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the experiment was logged */,
  "hostname" TEXT /* Hostname of the machine running the experiment */,
  "node_ip" TEXT /* IP address of the node running the experiment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who conducted the experiment */,
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the project this experiment belongs to */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Human-readable name for the experiment */,
  "description" TEXT /* A brief description of the experiment */,
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the dataset used in the experiment */,
  "model_type" TEXT /* Type of model used */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of metric used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_project_id FOREIGN KEY ("project_id") REFERENCES projects ("project_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_dataset_id FOREIGN KEY ("dataset_id") REFERENCES datasets ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_configs" (
  "config_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each configuration entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment this configuration belongs to */,
  "hidden_dim" INTEGER /* Hidden dimension size used in the model */,
  "n_rnn_layers" INTEGER /* Number of RNN layers in the model */,
  "training_length" INTEGER /* Length of training iterations */,
  "input_chunk_length" INTEGER /* Input chunk length for the model */,
  "n_epochs" INTEGER /* Number of epochs for training */,
  "batch_size" INTEGER /* Batch size used for training */,
  "dropout" REAL /* Dropout rate used in the model */,
  "output_chunk_length" INTEGER /* Output chunk length for the model */,
  "learning_rate" REAL /* Learning rate used in the model */,
  "optimizer" TEXT /* Optimizer used */,
  "loss_function" TEXT /* Loss function used */,
  "scheduler" TEXT /* Learning rate scheduler used */,
  "data_augmentation" INTEGER /* Indicates if data augmentation was used */,
  "data_normalization" TEXT /* Type of data normalization used */,
  "model_architecture" TEXT /* Detailed description of the model architecture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("config_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_configs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment this tag belongs to */,
  "tag" TEXT /* The tag associated with the experiment */,
  "tag_type" TEXT /* The type of tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_tags_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_logs" (
  "log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment this log belongs to */,
  "iteration" INTEGER /* The iteration number being logged */,
  "timestamp" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when this log was created */,
  "metrics" TEXT /* Metrics output for this iteration in JSON format */,
  "log_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the log entry */,
  "log_type" TEXT /* The type of log */,
  "log_status" TEXT /* The status of the log entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data scientist, admin) */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team this user belongs to */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" INTEGER /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log entry */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_time" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "access_description" TEXT /* A brief description of the access event */,
  "access_ip" TEXT /* The IP address from which the access occurred */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "projects" (
  "project_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each project */,
  "project_name" TEXT /* Name of the project */,
  "project_description" TEXT /* Description of the project */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the project was created */,
  "updated_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the project was last updated */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the project (e.g., active, archived) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("project_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "datasets" (
  "dataset_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dataset */,
  "dataset_name" TEXT /* Name of the dataset */,
  "dataset_description" TEXT /* Description of the dataset */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the dataset was created */,
  "updated_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the dataset was last updated */,
  "size" TEXT /* Size of the dataset */,
  "format" TEXT /* Format of the dataset */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dataset_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "team_description" TEXT /* Description of the team */,
  "created_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the team was created */,
  "updated_at" INTEGER /* Timestamp of when the team was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)
